title: OCI API Call Burst by User
description: Detects users making an unusually high number of API calls in a short window, which may indicate automated enumeration or data exfiltration scripts.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' | stats count as api_calls by 'Principal Name', 'Event Type' | where api_calls > 100 | sort -api_calls
notes: High API call volume from a single principal may indicate automated data collection. Cross-reference with known CI/CD service accounts.
